allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force"; echo done)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess | Format-Table; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen\).OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$procs = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
foreach \(\\$p in \\$procs\) { Stop-Process -Id \\$p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Start-Sleep 2
Write-Host 'Port 5000 listeners:' \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$procs = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique
foreach \(\\$p in \\$procs\) { Stop-Process -Id \\$p -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }
Start-Sleep 2
Write-Host 'cleared'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "\\$p = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1\).OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id \\$p | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path")
Bash(python -c "import werkzeug; import inspect; import werkzeug.security as ws; print\(inspect.getsource\(ws.check_password_hash\)\)")
